creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text:
When running `make check-plist', on www/webkit-qt5, I get the following messages:

===> Parsing plist
sed: 1: "s!/usr/local/!!g;  s!li ...": unterminated substitute pattern
sed: 1: "s!/usr/local/!!g;  s!li ...": unterminated substitute pattern
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
===> Checking for directories owned by MTREEs
sed: 1: "s!/usr/local/!!g;  s!li ...": unterminated substitute pattern
===> Checking for directories handled by dependencies
sed: 1: "s!/usr/local/!!g;  s!li ...": unterminated substitute pattern
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
sed: 1: "s!/usr/local/!!g;  s!li ...": unterminated substitute pattern
sed: 1: "s!/usr/local/!!g;  s!li ...": unterminated substitute pattern
===> No pkg-plist issues found (check-plist)

This comes from setup_plist_seds() generating a sed_files_gen value that is too long (ie. > the size of lbuf in src's usr.bin/sed/compile.c's compile_stream() function), which causes the value to be truncated by sed. The value looks like this:

's!/usr/local/!!g;  s!lib/ruby/vendor_ruby/1\.9/amd64-freebsd11!%%RUBY_VENDORARCHLIBDIR%%!g;  s!lib/ruby/site_ruby/1\.9/amd64-freebsd11!%%RUBY_SITEARCHLIBDIR%%!g;  s!share/examples/ruby19/webkit!%%RUBY_MODEXAMPLESDIR%%!g;  s!lib/ruby/1\.9/amd64-freebsd11!%%RUBY_ARCHLIBDIR%%!g;  s!lib/python2\.7/site-packages!%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%!g;  s!lib/ruby/vendor_ruby/1\.9!%%RUBY_VENDORLIBDIR%%!g;  s!lib/perl5/site_perl/5\.16!%%SITE_PERL%%!g;  s!share/doc/ruby19/webkit!%%RUBY_MODDOCDIR%%!g;  s!lib/perl5/5\.16/man/man3!%%PERL5_MAN3%%!g;  s!share/qt5/translations!%%QT_L10NDIR%%!g;  s!lib/ruby/site_ruby/1\.9!%%RUBY_SITELIBDIR%%!g;  s!share/examples/webkit!%%EXAMPLESDIR%%!g;  s!share/examples/ruby19!%%RUBY_EXAMPLESDIR%%!g;  s!share/ri/1\.9/system!%%RUBY_RIDIR%%!g;  s!share/examples/qt5!%%QT_EXAMPLEDIR%%!g;  s!share/ri/1\.9/site!%%RUBY_SITERIDIR%%!g;  s!include/python2\.7!%%PYTHON_INCLUDEDIR%%!g;  s!share/doc/webkit!%%DOCSDIR%%!g;  s!share/doc/ruby19!%%RUBY_DOCDIR%%!g;  s!share/qt5/tests!%%QT_TESTDIR%%!g;  s!lib/qt5/plugins!%%QT_PLUGINDIR%%!g;  s!lib/qt5/mkspecs!%%QT_MKSPECDIR%%!g;  s!lib/qt5/imports!%%QT_IMPORTDIR%%!g;  s!amd64-freebsd11!%%RUBY_ARCH%%!g;  s!lib/ruby/elisp!%%RUBY_ELISPDIR%%!g;  s!share/doc/qt5!%%QT_DOCDIR%%!g;  s!lib/python2\.7!%%PYTHON_LIBDIR%%!g;  s!share/webkit!%%DATADIR%%!g;  s!lib/ruby/1\.9!%%RUBY_LIBDIR%%!g;  s!libexec/qt5!%%QT_LIBEXECDIR%%!g;  s!lib/qt5/qml!%%QT_QMLDIR%%!g;  s!lib/qt5/bin!%%QT_BINDIR%%!g;  s!include/qt5!%%QT_INCDIR%%!g;  s!www/webkit!%%WWWDIR%%!g;  s!etc/webkit!%%ETCDIR%%!g;  s!/usr/local!%%QT_PREFIX%%!g;  s!share/qt5!%%QT_DATADIR%%!g;  s!python2\.7!%%PYTHON_VERSION%%!g;  s!freebsd11!%%PYTHON_PLATFORM%%!g;  s!1\.9\.3\.547!%%RUBY_VERSION%%!g;  s!lib/qt5!%%QT_ARCHDIR%%!g;  s!etc/xdg!%%QT_ETCDIR%%!g;  s!ruby19!%%RUBY_NAME%%!g;  s!5\.16\.3!%%PERL_VERSION%%!g;  s!2\.10\.0!%%GTK2_VERSION%%!g;  s!5\.3\.1!%%FULLVER%%!g;  s!3\.0\.0!%%GTK3_VERSION%%!g;  s!mach!%%PERL_ARCH%%!g;  s!5\.16!%%PERL_VER%%!g;  s!lib!%%QT_LIBDIR%%!g;  s!5\.3!%%SHORTVER%%!g;  s!1\.9!%%RUBY_VER%%!g;  s!19!%%RUBY_SUFFIX%%!g;  s!19!%%RUBY_SHLIBVER%%!g;  s!19!%%RUBY_DEFAULT_SUFFIX%%!g;          /%%DOCSDIR%%/s!^!%%PORTDOCS%%!g; /%%EXAMPLESDIR%%/s!^!%%PORTEXAMPLES%%!g; /^share\/licenses/d;'
